class.name: PhysicsRayQueryResult3D
class.experimental: This class is experimental and still subject to changes. While experimental no compatibility will be provided.
class.brief_description: Represents the result of a 3D physics ray query.
class.description: This class stores the result of a direct [PhysicsServer3D] query, e.g. using [method PhysicsServer3D.query_intersect_ray].

method.name: get_collider_id
method.description: Returns the [code]ObjectID[/code] of the object which manages the collider (e.g. a [Node]). Use [method @GlobalScope.instance_from_id] to retrieve an [Object] from a nonzero [code]ObjectID[/code]. Returns [code]0[/code] when there is no object or when [param index] is out of range. [b]Warning:[/b] While the results are thread-safe receiving unsafe objects like Nodes is not. To avoid unexpected issues receive thread-unsafe objects on the main thread.

method.name: get_collider_rid
method.description: Returns the server [RID] handle of the collider. Returns [code]0[/code] when the handle is invalid or when [param index] is out of range.

method.name: get_collider_shape_index
method.description: Returns the shape index of the collider shape. Returns [code]-1[/code] when invalid or when [param index] is out of range. [b]Warning:[/b] Changing collider shapes may invalidate this index.

method.name: get_collider_shape_rid
method.description: Returns the server [RID] handle of the collider shape. [b]Warning:[/b] A shape may be shared and used by many colliders.

method.name: get_collision_normal
method.description: Returns the normal of the intersecting object's shape at the collision point. Returns [code]Vector2(0, 0)[/code] when their is no valid intersection or when [param index] is out of range.

method.name: get_collision_point
method.description: Returns the collision point at which the ray intersects the object. Returns [code]Vector2(0, 0)[/code] when their is no valid intersection or when [param index] is out of range.

method.name: is_empty
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the results are empty. See also [method size].

method.name: size
method.description: Returns the number of intersections in the results. Empty results always return [code]0[/code]. See also [method is_empty].
